channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-20
item.description:
Our community has been buzzing with activity across multiple projects. Notably, the scienceverse/metacheck project has seen the addition of "japs jamovi" to its "data_check" branch, potentially enhancing its integration with JASP or jamovi statistical software. Meanwhile, the marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing project has made significant progress, with Anka successfully building the site for version 0.4.1 on the `gh-pages` branch. On the `master` branch, Alex O. Holcombe has been refining the project's wording and formatting, including italicizing testimonials for emphasis. These updates demonstrate the collaborative spirit and dedication to improvement that defines our community, and we look forward to seeing the impact of these changes. As our projects continue to evolve, we're excited to explore potential connections and synergies between them, such as how the metacheck updates might complement the tenzing project's developments.

32 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
metacheck8 commits
regcheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits
